title: Fixed size string concatenation with integer results in fixed size string of size 0
key_bug_features: Fixed size string concatenation with integer
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id INT PRIMARY KEY, fixed_str CHAR(5), num_val INT);
INSERT INTO test_strings (id, fixed_str, num_val) VALUES (1, 'abcde', 123);
INSERT INTO test_strings (id, fixed_str, num_val) VALUES (2, 'fghij', NULL);
SELECT fixed_str || num_val FROM test_strings WHERE num_val IS NOT NULL;
SELECT fixed_str || 678 FROM test_strings WHERE id = 1;
